block_01: When you think about it, business and trading have much more in common than generally accepted. Traders can, and should, learn from successful businessmen to improve their results.
block_02: Hurdles that businessmen and traders face are often similar. In this article you will find 7 common pitfalls that can ruin a company or a trading career — and ways to avoid them.
block_04: How to Tell the Trend from Price Noise?
block_05: The trend is your friend, yet the trend is not always obvious. Random Walk Index does a great job of eliminating the price noise and highlighting the trend.
block_08: A technical analysis classic that never runs out of style. This simple indicator is capable of so much that you just cannot miss it. Learn how to set up and use the Stochastic in practice.
